pageDescription: Claim your airdrop, swap from ETH or USDC, and add the token to your wallet.
connectWalletToClaim: Connect a wallet to claim or trade $SOF.
initialClaimDescription: Link Farcaster for a bigger drop. One-time claim per wallet.
dailyClaimDescription: Top up your balance once a day. No rewards for streaks — just a counter.
dailyCooldownDescription: You're set for now. Come back later to claim again.
connectFarcaster: Link your Farcaster account to claim your initial $SOF
testnetEthDescription: Pick any of these external faucets to top up Sepolia ETH.
powFaucetDescription: Mines proof-of-work in your browser; no signup.
tokenInfoDescription: Import $SOF into other wallets manually with these details.
